title: nardurus unilateralis
intro: Nardurus unilateralis, also known as the unilateral nardurus, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of nardurus unilateralis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Nardurus unilateralis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
